title: Nucor to create 140 new jobs with new melt shop in Arizona
text: Shares of Nucor Corp. NUE, -2.02% tacked on 0.4% in premarket trading Wednesday, after the steel maker said it would create 140 new full-time jobs, as it adds a new $100 million melt shop at its bar mill in Kingman, Arizona. The company said the new jobs will pay an average annual wage of about $85,000.

title: Time for a Breath of Sanity
text: After a drop of about 20% in the first six months of this year, investors feel nervous even though July has been good.
